column2: # Fit a linear mixed-effects model for length
my_lenght_model <- lmer(growthL ~ GrowthTemperatureOut + GrowthTemperatureBack + EHYear_Extracted + release_group + (1 | IndividualID), data = df_nNa)
# Fit a linear mixed-effects model for Weight
my_weight_model <- lmer(growthW ~ GrowthTemperatureOut + GrowthTemperatureBack + EHYear_Extracted + release_group + (1 | IndividualID), data = df_nNa)
# Show both models side by side
tab_model(my_lenght_model, my_weight_model, show.p = TRUE, show.ci = TRUE)
